name: AI Resume Screening and Candidate Shortlisting

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  model: 'llama3.2:1b',
  stream: false,
  format: 'json',
  prompt: 'Extract the following details from this resume text:
- Name
- Email
- Skills (array)
- Experience (number)
- Education

Return STRICT JSON only with this structure:
{
  "name": "",
  "email": "",
  "skills": [],
  "experience": 0,
  "education": ""
}

Resume Text:
' + $json.resumeText
} }}

parameters.subject: =Shortlisted Candidate - {{$json.name || 'Unknown Candidate'}}
